name: HypNO: A Graph-Based Neural Operator with Physics-Informed Message Passing for Hyperbolic Conservation Laws
summary: arXiv:2607.20541v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce HypNO, a graph-based neural operator for scalar hyperbolic conservation laws. HypNO operates directly on a space-time graph of finite-...
description: arXiv:2607.20541v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce HypNO, a graph-based neural operator for scalar hyperbolic conservation laws. HypNO operates directly on a space-time graph of finite-volume cells and uses adjacency-factored, physics-informed message passing to respect upwinding and entropy admissibility near shocks. We benchmark the architecture on the Lighthill-Whitham-Richards (...
author: Dimitrije \v{Z}drale, Cassie An Jeng, Katie Wang, Sonia Vanier, Alexandre Bayen, Hossein Nick Zinat Matin
